title: Backend Engineer / Java Developer
description: Who are we? Our business is technology, food and retail. We are a young team that combines all resources with technology; Our goal is to provide an excellent e-commerce service to meet your needs. In short, you can call us Migros One. 😉 Today, as a team that holds the “Great Place To Work” certificate with the contributions of our employees we produce, learn and develop together. We rediscover our passion for our business every day and build Migros One culture together. Our Culture We are #ONE to create a better tomorrow for our community. Our way of working includes four core values that we strive to act: 1. Take accountability with passion 2. Drive innovation with curiosity 3. Make a difference for our customers 4. Create open communication We live these values every day and create an environment where everyone enjoys working. Our business culture based on trust, openness and innovation has been recognized with our “Great Place To Work” certificate! What Do We Do? As Migros One; We spread happiness in being the pioneer of innovation in the field of food and retail technology with our brands Migros Sanal Market, Migros Hemen, Migros Extra, Migros Yemek, Macroonline, Tazedirekt, Mion and Petimo! Our determination to find fast and effective solutions always keeps us one step ahead. Our team's passion and energy make their jobs enjoyable. Thanks to our people-oriented approach, we aim to create a more comfortable and practical world for everyone by using them all. We constantly strive to provide the best experience to our consumers and employees!As Migros One team, we get excited with every member of our team creating his/her own career story! If you would like to be a part of this visionary and tech-savvy e-commerce team, don’t wait! Make your application! We are looking for Backend Engineer who will be on our team. What You'll Be Doing: Contributing the software development lifecycle. (technical design, implementation, testing, deployment, and monitoring.), Identification ability of engineering bottlenecks and discussing potential solutions. (redact RFC and ADR documents.), Responsible for the quality assurance of the work we work on, Applying a product mindset to back-end systems, Regularly presenting new ideas and techniques in Brown Bag Sessions, Improving the System Design of the solution architecture on production. What You'll Bring: Minimum 4 years of experience as a back-end engineer, Production experience with Java 21 (11 or 17 is also fine), REST Conventions, Redis and Docker, Hands-on implementation practice of Object-Oriented Design Patterns is a must, Familiarity of security concepts and methodologies is a nice-to-have. (OAuth2, OIDC, Authorization Code Flow, etc.), Knowledge of Messaging Solutions (RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka, or similar) is required, Experience with AWS, GCP, OpenShift, Azure or similar is highly desired, Experience with Clean or Hexagonal Architecture is a nice-to-have, Domain-Driven Design is a nice-to-have. (Tactical DDD, Aggregate Design Rules, Eventual and Strong Consistency, etc.), Knowledge of Microservices Patterns is a nice-to-have. (Transactional Outbox, Data Consistency with Saga.), Unit, Integration and E2E test knowledge is a plus.

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description: Cozmopol Hakkında Cozmopol, kullanıcıların avatarlar ile etkileşime girebildiği, yapay zeka destekli 3D bir alışveriş deneyimi sunan bir platformdur. Hedefimiz yüksek performanslı ve ölçeklenebilir bir altyapı ile global bir ürün ortaya çıkarmak. Pozisyon Hakkında Backend sistemlerinin geliştirilmesi ve ölçeklenmesinde aktif rol alacak bir Node.js Backend Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyonda, API geliştirme, sistem mimarisi ve performans konularında sorumluluk alacaksın. Sorumluluklar Node.js ile RESTful API geliştirme Mikroservis mimarisi kurma ve geliştirme Performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik iyileştirmeleri yapma Authentication ve authorization süreçlerini yönetme Gerçek zamanlı sistemler geliştirme (WebSocket vb.) Üçüncü parti servis entegrasyonları Frontend ve diğer ekiplerle koordineli çalışma Temiz ve sürdürülebilir kod yazımı Aranan Nitelikler Node.js (Express veya Fastify) deneyimi REST API ve sistem tasarımı bilgisi Veritabanı deneyimi (MongoDB, PostgreSQL vb.) Redis, cache ve queue sistemleri hakkında bilgi Docker ve temel DevOps süreçlerine aşinalık Git kullanımı Tercih Sebepleri Cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) deneyimi Gerçek zamanlı sistem tecrübesi Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde çalışma deneyimi

title: Backend-Frontend Developer
description: Yapılacak olan TÜSEB başvurumuz için ekip arkadaşları arıyoruz. Proje kapsamında NGS datasının işlenmesi ve varyant analizi (tespit, anotasyon, filtreleme ve görselleştirme) süreçlerini uçtan uca destekleyen bir biyoinformatik altyapı olacaktır. Backend Geliştirici: API geliştirme konusunda deneyimli Veritabanı yönetimi ve tasarımı bilgisine sahip Python veya Node.js teknolojilerinde tecrübeli Bilgisayar Mühendisliği veya Yazılım Mühendisliği bölümünden mezun (TÜSEB Başvurusunda diploma sunma zorunluluğu bulunmaktadır bu nedenle sadece bilgisayar mühendisliği veya yazılım mühendisliği bölümünden mezun kişiler ile görüşme yapılacaktır) En az 2 yıl iş tecrübesi olan Frontend Geliştirici: React, Vue.js framework’lerinde deneyimli Veri görselleştirme konusunda bilgi sahibi API entegrasyonu süreçlerine hakim Bilgisayar Mühendisliği veya Yazılım Mühendisliği bölümünden mezun (TÜSEB Başvurusunda diploma sunma zorunluluğu bulunmaktadır bu nedenle sadece bilgisayar mühendisliği veya yazılım mühendisliği bölümünden mezun kişiler ile görüşme yapılacaktır) En az 2 yıl iş tecrübesi olan Önemli Not Bu ilan, Türkiye Sağlık Enstitüleri Başkanlığı (TÜSEB) proje başvurusu kapsamında ön başvuru toplamak amacıyla paylaşılmaktadır. Projenin desteklenmesi halinde işe alım gerçekleştirilecektir. Başvuru Süreci Başvurularınızı, özgeçmişiniz ile birlikte info@genessencedx.com adresine iletebilirsiniz. Uygun adaylarla proje süreci içerisinde iletişime geçilecektir. Son Başvuru Tarihi: 10.05.2026

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (React / Node.js)
description: Nuevo Softwarehouse olarak, Almany a merkezli üretim şirketi süreçlerinde değerlendirilmek üzere Senior Fullstack Developer (React / Node.js ) ekip arkadaşı arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Çalışma Dili: İngilizce Çalışma Şekli: Remote Responsibilities Developing and maintaining a modern React frontend (min 5 years) Integrating Backend APIs (REST) Integrating cloud services, particularly for file storage and databases Setting up and improving CI/CD pipelines Establishing build, deployment, and containerization (Docker) processes Ensuring code quality, performance, and maintainability Required Qualifications Experience in developing web applications with Node.js for production environments (min. 5 years) Experience in JavaScript development (min. 5 years) Experience in React development (min. 5 years) Experience with REST APIs and frontend integration (min. 3 years) German: Intermediate level (B1) English: Upper-Intermediate / Independent user level (B2) Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have) Basic knowledge of relational databases (e.g., SQL) Knowledge of Docker and containerization Basic knowledge of authentication concepts (e.g., Entra ID) Basic understanding of Kubernetes Experience with Blob Storage (file upload/management) Experience with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Azure DevOps)

title: Mobile Developer - React Native
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Mobile Developer - React Native in Turkey. You will join a fast-moving, globally distributed engineering team focused on building high-performance mobile applications for a cutting-edge digital trading platform. The role involves designing and delivering new mobile features that enhance user experience in real-time financial environments. You will work on highly scalable systems that support rapid user growth while maintaining speed and reliability. A strong emphasis is placed on crafting seamless data visualization experiences powered by large-scale data streams. Operating in an agile and collaborative setting, you will contribute to both technical design and product evolution. This position offers the opportunity to shape impactful mobile solutions used by a global user base in a dynamic fintech space. You will collaborate closely with engineers, designers, and product teams to continuously improve the mobile experience. Accountabilities Develop and enhance mobile applications using React Native, focusing on performance, usability, and scalability Build and ship new features using agile methodologies in a fast-paced development environment Optimize application responsiveness and ensure smooth real-time user experiences at scale Implement and improve data visualization components based on large and complex datasets Integrate RESTful APIs and WebSocket-based services for real-time functionality Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and deliver innovative mobile solutions Contribute to code quality, testing, and continuous improvement of mobile architecture Requirements Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+) and solid experience with React Native Hands-on experience with Redux and modern mobile development workflows Good understanding of Expo and React Native ecosystem best practices Experience working with REST APIs and WebSockets for real-time applications Familiarity with mobile performance optimization and scalable app architecture Knowledge of native mobile development (Swift and/or Kotlin) is a plus Experience with Xcode and Android Studio is advantageous Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in an agile, distributed team environment Passion for building high-quality, user-centric mobile applications Benefits Fully remote work with global flexibility Competitive compensation package Strong focus on career development and continuous learning Mentorship from experienced engineers and industry professionals Collaborative and supportive international team culture Regular knowledge-sharing initiatives and technical workshops Team-building activities and social engagement opportunities (remote and in-person) How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Front-End Developer (Vue.js / React)
description: Senior Front-End Developer (Vue.js / React) Ankara'daki ofisimizde çalışmak üzere, modern arayüzler geliştirmeyi seven ve kullanıcı deneyimini önceliklendiren Senior Front-End Developer arıyoruz. Aradığımız Profil İleri seviye Vue.js bilgisi React.js konusunda deneyimli Figma’yı aktif ve profesyonel kullanabilen UI/UX hassasiyeti yüksek, tasarımı birebir koda dökebilen Responsive ve pixel-perfect geliştirme konusunda deneyimli RESTful API entegrasyonlarına hakim Modern JavaScript (ES6+) konusunda güçlü Component bazlı mimari konusunda deneyimli Git kullanımına hakim Gerektiğinde tasarımları framework bağımsız şekilde, temiz ve optimize edilmiş HTML/CSS olarak geliştirebilen 🧩 Tercihen Figma üzerinde tasarım oluşturabilen veya tasarım olmadan da kullanıcı dostu arayüzler tasarlayıp geliştirebilen Nuxt.js ve/veya Next.js deneyimi Tailwind / SCSS bilgisi Performans optimizasyonu ve SEO bilgisi Agile / Scrum süreçlerine aşinalık 💼 Sorumluluklar Figma tasarımlarını yüksek doğrulukla koda dökmek Vue.js ve React projelerinde aktif geliştirme yapmak Mevcut projelerde UI geliştirme ve iyileştirme yapmak API entegrasyonlarını gerçekleştirmek Performans ve kullanıcı deneyimini sürekli optimize etmek İlgilenen adayların güncel CV ve portföylerini ik@webimonline.com adresine iletmeleri rica olunur.

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Senior Backend Developer (Python/Django)
description: REQUIREMENTS: Ideally having a degree in Computer Science and strong Engineering background, Minimum of 5 years software development experience and exposure to the web applications & architectures, Excellent knowledge of Python. Having experience at developing back-end solutions, Experienced at MVC pattern, RESTful web services, and web frameworks; e.g. Django, Good at developing Node.js based asynchronous solutions, Working knowledge on synchronous programming by means of utilizing frameworks such as, Gevent, Tornado, Asyncio, Node.js, etc. Having experience on building multi-threaded and multi-process solutions, Good at working with RDBMS’s (PostgreSQL) and No-SQL databases (MongoDB), Having prior interest on trading (@Fiat and/or Crypto currencies) is desired but not strictly required, Working knowledge on Blockchain technology and ecosystem, Strong verbal and written communication skills. JOB DESCRIPTION: Develops new features and handles maintenance activities for our web-based exchange platform. Upholds a high standard of code quality via following best practices and DevOps automation. Writes clean, maintainable and testable code. Expected to turn business goals into tech solutions. Supports the entire application lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, and support). Recommends engineering solutions for both functional and non-functional requirements. Works with Agile development methodology and principles. Follows engineering approaches while developing software and apply design principles fits with the selected software architecture. Mentor others, does code reviews, and performs pair programming.

entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje title: Software Architect (Full Stack)
description: ABOUT US ICterra is a global software engineering company with offices in Munich, İstanbul and Ankara. We combine 30 years of software development experience with technology expertise and proven methodologies to provide innovative solutions to our customers across multiple industries globally. With 150+ software professionals, we have been building strategic partnerships with the world’s top IT and defence companies, providing software development and test services. Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical/Electronics Engineering or related fields Minimum 8 years of experience Working with at least one web framework (Angular, React, Vue, etc.), Angular Framework is a plus Strong working experience with C# and .NET Core Working experience with Typescript/JavaScript Knowledge of JSON and REST APIs Knowledge of Entity Framework Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies is a plus

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — Platform Extensions
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer — Platform Extensions in Turkey. You will join a globally distributed engineering team building and evolving integrations that connect major digital platforms with external ecosystems at scale. The role spans both backend and frontend development, focusing on robust, maintainable systems that power widely used digital products and services. You will contribute to platform extensions across tools such as WordPress, WooCommerce, and Webflow, ensuring seamless connectivity with partner APIs and services. This is a highly collaborative environment where engineers actively shape architecture, technical direction, and long-term product evolution. You will work closely with product managers, designers, and external partners to translate complex requirements into elegant, scalable solutions. The position is ideal for engineers who enjoy end-to-end ownership, technical depth, and solving integration challenges across modern web ecosystems. You will be part of a remote-first, globally diverse team that values autonomy, craftsmanship, and continuous improvement. Accountabilities Build, maintain, and enhance platform integrations, plugins, and services connecting core web platforms with external partner ecosystems. Develop full stack features using backend technologies (PHP, APIs, data systems) and modern frontend frameworks (JavaScript, React). Contribute to architectural decisions, technical planning, and estimation to ensure scalable and maintainable system design. Collaborate with product managers, designers, and partner teams to define requirements and deliver incremental value. Improve engineering practices through code reviews, debugging, refactoring, and reduction of technical debt. Adopt and apply modern development workflows, including AI-assisted tools, to improve delivery efficiency and code quality. Requirements Strong professional experience as a full stack engineer working with PHP and modern JavaScript (React or similar frameworks). Proven experience building APIs, web applications, or platform integrations across complex systems. Solid understanding of system design, scalability, and integration patterns between distributed services. Strong product mindset with the ability to connect technical execution to user and business value. Experience working in collaborative, cross-functional, and remote/distributed environments. High attention to code quality, maintainability, debugging, and continuous improvement practices. Curiosity and willingness to adopt modern tools, including AI-assisted development workflows. Benefits Competitive salary based on experience, skills, and location. Remote-first flexibility with the ability to work from anywhere globally. Opportunity to work on large-scale, high-impact digital products. Collaborative, international team environment with strong engineering culture. Career growth opportunities through ownership of complex, end-to-end technical solutions. Continuous learning culture with exposure to modern technologies and workflows. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Join us and be a part of shaping the future of urban mobility! Some complain about traffic but some are actually doing something about it. Join us on our mission to reduce traffic in Istanbul by increasing the accessibility of sustainable shared mobility. Who are we? Volt Lines is the only technology-enabled player in the Turkish market competing against legacy incumbents and it reduces emissions and traffic by turning premium 16-seater buses into a viable alternative to single occupancy vehicles. What we do? In Istanbul, over 50,000 buses operate at 31% efficiency. These buses, which contribute to the city's traffic with empty seats, could also be the solution to its problem. Volt Lines is the only shuttle service provider that has both software as well as a transport service. This allows for optimal harmonization of the software and operation resulting in the creation of great experiences and services. Notable examples of these innovative services include DRT and Marketplace. DRT (short for Demand-Responsive Transport) was covered by a Harvard Business School case study that is being taught at the MBA school. Marketplace on the other hand allows companies to sell empty seats on their buses to neighboring passengers who are going in the same direction at the same time. Let's work together to shape the future of mobility. We are looking for a talented Backend Engineer to join our team and contribute to building innovative solutions that enhance the future of transportation. Responsibilities Design, implement, and maintain server-side applications to support Volt Lines’ business objectives. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and design new features. Optimize and improve existing backend architecture for performance and reliability. Conduct thorough testing and troubleshooting of backend systems. Stay updated with emerging technologies and integrate them into the development process. Contribute to database design and management, ensuring data integrity and security. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 3+ years of experience in backend development with Python.. Strong working experience with Django and Django REST Framework. Solid experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs Production experience with PostgreSQL; schema design, query optimization, migrations on live systems. Working experience with Redis for caching and Celery for asynchronous task processing. Familiarity with Kafka or similar event streaming systems Experience with Git-based workflows, code review culture, and writing meaningful tests for your own code. Understanding of containerization with Docker and orchestration basics with Kubernetes. Effective verbal and written communication skills in English. Nice to Have Hands-on experience with AWS services; EKS, RDS, S3, EC2, Elasticache. Familiarity with observability tooling; OpenTelemetry, Grafana, Sentry, or equivalent. Experience with CI/CD pipelines; Bitbucket Pipelines, GitHub Actions, or similar. Exposure to geospatial systems, mapping APIs, or logistics/transportation domain. Experience with multi-tenant SaaS architectures and feature flagging systems. Working knowledge of Golang is a plus. Benefits Innovative Environment: Volt Lines operates in a fast-growing, innovative industry, offering opportunities to work on impactful projects with cutting-edge technology. Career Growth: Volt Lines is committed to employee development, offering opportunities for career progression, training, and skill enhancement. Work-Life Balance: Volt Lines offers flexible working hours as well as a flexible paid time-off policy that promotes a healthy work-life balance. Startup Culture: Volt Lines embodies a startup environment that promotes creativity, autonomy, and innovation, providing employees with the freedom to take initiative and make decisions. Inclusive Work Culture: Volt Lines values different perspectives, backgrounds, and experiences, and fosters an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. Impact on Urban Mobility: Volt Lines focuses on revolutionizing urban transportation and sustainability, giving employees a chance to contribute to a purpose-driven mission. Compensation and Benefits: Volt Lines offers its employees a best-in-class equity program (RSUs), the chance to earn up to 20 salaries in a year, private health insurance, food and transportation allowances among other perks.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Novus is Istanbul and Boston based, a next-generation AI startup developing hybrid and on prem Large Language Model (LLM) solutions for industries dealing with strict data privacy and regulatory needs. Our AI agents act like real team members automating tasks in sales, finance, content creation, and more. They don't just perform tasks; they learn, adapt, and improve themselves all without requiring any coding or AI expertise from the user. At the heart of this transformation are our flagship products, Dot and Dot Nano. Dot is a powerful AI command center that lets businesses orchestrate multiple LLMs and agents in a single platform, enabling them to collaborate, share tasks, and automate complex workflows across the organization. Dot Nano complements this by turning natural language into deployable agentic workflows in under 60 seconds — making advanced automation accessible to every team member, not just technical users. Together, they form an end-to-end agentic AI stack: Nano lands the individual user with instant value, while Dot scales across the enterprise. Designed to meet strict GDPR/KVKK standards, our platform is ideal for sectors like banking, healthcare, and insurance — turning AI into a trusted, strategic asset instead of just a tool. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and maintain robust backend systems and APIs. • Optimize server-side logic for performance and scalability. • Collaborate with frontend engineers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. • Implement and manage database systems ensuring data integrity and security. • Integrate AI models and support their deployment in production environments. • Work within an agile development environment, participating in code reviews and continuous improvement initiatives. Must-Haves: • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. • Proven experience in backend development with a strong foundation in programming languages such as Node.js or similar • Solid understanding of backend frameworks such as Express, and experience with databases (NoSQL, e.g., MongoDB). • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes). • Strong problem-solving skills and a data-driven approach to debugging and performance optimization. • Excellent communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a team setting. • Having hands-on experience building flows with various tools. • Proficiency in orchestration products such as LangGraph and LangChain • Proven experience in backend development with a strong foundation in programming languages such as Node.js, next.js, Express.js or similar development technologies •Actively using AI-native development tools such as Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor as part of the development process. Big Pluses: • Hands-on experience with full-stack development or integration of AI models into backend systems. • Participation in hackathons, AI projects, or open-source contributions. • Familiarity with microservices architecture and RESTful API design best practices. Why Join Us? • Professional Growth: Work on complex projects that challenge your skills and expand your expertise in modern backend technologies and AI integration. • Real Impact: Contribute to innovative AI projects that make a tangible difference in the industry. • Collaborative Culture: Be part of a team that values your insights and fosters a supportive, innovative environment. • Networking Opportunities: Build meaningful connections with industry professionals and thought leaders. At Novus, you'll be part of a journey to shape the ever-evolving world of AI. We're not just building the DOT product; we're crafting the future of AI. If you're ready to make a significant impact in a company that values innovation and collaboration, we can't wait to welcome you to Novus! And if you'd like to learn even more about working here, you can visit our Novus LinkedIn page.
